stories.headline: ‘Top Gear’s Jeremy Clarkson Diagnosed With “Aggressive” Cancer: “It’s Really Early” - Deadline
stories.summary: Jeremy Clarkson has revealed that he is battling prostate cancer. The Top Gear legend opened up about his diagnosis during the final episodes of Clarkson's Farm Season 5.

stories.headline: Jelly Roll's Daughter Bailee Ann "Disgusted" by Comments on Bunnie Xo Divorce - E! News
stories.summary: Bailee Ann DeFord reacted to all the attention on her dad Jelly Roll’s divorce from stepmom Bunnie Xo, calling the situation a “clearly private family matter.”

stories.headline: 'The Pitt' star Katherine LaNasa was haunted by ex-husband Dennis Hopper's ghost - Entertainment Weekly
stories.summary: 'The Pitt' star Katherine LaNasa is recalling being haunted by the ghost of her ex-husband Dennis Hopper after his death in 2010: 'It was super upsetting.'

stories.headline: 5 Zodiac Signs With Very Good Horoscopes On Wednesday, June 17, 2026 - YourTango
stories.summary: On June 17, 2026, five zodiac signs have very good horoscopes. They are: Taurus, Virgo, Capricorn, Aquarius, and Pisces.

stories.headline: How West Wilson tried to get Lindsay Hubbard, Kyle Cooke and Carl Radke fired from 'Summer House': report - Page Six
stories.summary: The axed cast member was speaking to producers behind his co-stars’ backs and giving his opinion on future casting.

stories.headline: Blake Lively, Justin Baldoni settlement agreement revealed - USA Today
stories.summary: Days after the final ruling in Justin Baldoni and Blake Lively's yearslong legal battle, their official settlement agreement has been released.
